headline: Slip and fall at work Preparation Checklist — Boise Idaho
articleBody:
Slip and fall at work Preparation Checklist for Boise Idaho Clients

Before your Slip and fall at work appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
